name: the-final-frontier
description: A bare-bones Space Station 13: 4-6 player round-based traitor game on rlkit. Server-authoritative WebSocket server + thin canvas client.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run proof && npm run proof:breathing && npm run proof:net && npm run proof:station && npm run proof:interaction && npm run proof:items && npm run proof:power && npm run proof:tools
